prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约7595→6222→17919，2025年位次大幅后移约11700名，出现明显断档/波动；2025年基准约17919名；本省理科计划20 23–2024年均为11人，2025年增至15人；2026年计划18人，较2025年扩招3人（+20%），扩招对位次有后移作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第125名（2026 年），近年排名在124–131间波动，整体稳定；近年声誉平稳，无明显正面或负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第105（评价"一般"），短视频曝光量较低；未见 投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，对经济类相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、 电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，可能吸引高分考生；化学类、生物技术等属生化环材大类，热度明显劝退。本省2026年考生总数约23.8万（较2025年约7.65万大幅 增加约3倍），竞争显著加剧，对位次有前移作用。；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，距新疆 较远，属跨省报考；该校在新疆招生规模较小（理科15–18人），本地考生跨省报考意愿受地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的异常波动、2026年计 划小幅扩招（+20%）以及本省考生总数约3倍增长带来的竞争加剧，考虑考生规模激增的竞争压力远大于扩招的稀释效应，预计位次前移；预测 最低位次约19869名，区间19369–20369名。

- 电气工程及其自动化

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间19369–20369名内，建议以二档专业为主、一档冲刺、三档保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<19369）可重点冲刺计算机类、电气工程及其自动化等热门专业；位次 接近区间上限（>20369）建议优先考虑三档专业保底。辽宁大学应用经济学A-学科优势明显，经济学类虽社会热度分化但学科实力较强，值得关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science subjects was approximately 7595 → 6222 → 17919. In 2025, the ranking significantly shifted backward by about 11,700 places, showing a clear break/fluctuation. The 2025 baseline is approximately 17919. The provincial science enrollment plan was 11 students in both 2023 and 2024, increased to 15 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 18 students, an increase of 3 students (+20%) compared to 2025. The expansion has a backward-shifting effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 and Double First-Class university. Soft Science main ranking approximately 125th (2026), with recent rankings fluctuating between 124 and 131, overall stable. Recent reputation is stable, with no significant positive or negative public opinion incidents. Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 105th (rated 'average'), with low short video exposure. No records of enrollment breaks. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at this university, which has some appeal for applications to economics-related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly popular and recommended, potentially attracting high-scoring students. Majors like Chemistry and Biotechnology belong to the broader category of biology, chemistry, environment, and materials, with significantly lower appeal. The total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is approximately 238,000 (a roughly threefold increase from about 76,500 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition, which has a forward-shifting effect on rankings. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning Province, far from Xinjiang, making it a cross-provincial application. The university's enrollment scale in Xinjiang is small (15–18 science students), and local students' willingness to apply cross-province is limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormal fluctuation of a significant backward shift in rankings in 2025, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+20%), and the intensified competition due to a roughly threefold increase in the total number of examinees in the province, the competitive pressure from the surge in examinees far outweighs the dilution effect of the expansion. The ranking is expected to shift forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 19,869, with a range of 19,369 to 20,369.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Economics (Economics, National Economic Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Marketing)
- Archival Science
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry)
- Biotechnology/Bioinformatics
- Labor and Social Security
- Archaeology
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 19,369–20,369, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<19,369), you can focus on reaching for popular majors like Computer Science and Electrical Engineering and Automation. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>20,369), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors as a safety. Liaoning University's Applied Economics has a clear A- discipline advantage. Although the popularity of economics majors is socially divided, the discipline strength is notable and worth attention.
